creator: rpsfa@rit.edu
text:
- Update to 1.2.0:
--Fixed bug which resulted in "status" being ignored for single state sequences
--Added support for logging channels.
--Added support for state triggers.
--Fixed bug where alerts were being produced for state machines that have been
  expired. (Alerts have already been generated).
--Fixed two memory leaks which could really impact systems with high volumes
  audit records.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
